message:
feat(widgets): Add hit testing and cursor control to interactive widgets

- List: Added hit_id() method to enable mouse interaction. Each item
  registers a hit region with the item index as hit data.
- Table: Added hit_id() method to enable mouse interaction. Each row
  registers a hit region with the row index as hit data.
- TextInput: Now sets frame.cursor_position after rendering to support
  hardware cursor positioning for accessibility and IME input.

Added 8 new tests for the above features.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
